title: Graduate School of Addiction and Forensic Sciences Education
content:
Graduate School of Addiction and Forensic Sciences Education

Graduate School of Addiction and Forensic Sciences Education and Training

The design of our graduate-school's education and training programs includes the Turkish Higher Education Qualifications Framework in accordance with the Bologna process. Program designs are subject to continuous improvement and updating through regular meetings held in the relevant units and units, and are submitted to the University Senate for approval by the Graduate School Board. Designing graduate-school programs; It is carried out with the opinions received from internal and external stakeholders and the active participation of the academic staff of the unit.

Our priorities regarding the execution process of the programs;

-Courses are given by faculty members of the relevant discipline.

- Counseling processes are actively operated and our students can follow all these processes through the flow diagram.

-Course programs are created on the basis of the student's efficiency.

-Course schedules are announced at least 1 week before the start of education.

-Bologna updates are completed before the start of the academic year.

- E-mails from students to the Solution Center, faculty members or other units of the graduate-school are returned within 1 day.
